ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bowlers" (
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowler */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the bowler */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the bowler */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the bowler */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the bowler belongs to */,
  "bowler_type" TEXT /* Type of bowler (e.g., fast, spin, all-rounder) */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the bowler started their career */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the bowler ended their career (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowlers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the cricket team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "opposition_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI) */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, tie, draw) */,
  "match_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opposition_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opposition_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_bowling_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of bowling statistics */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the bowler */,
  "maidens_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the bowler */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded by the bowler */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the bowler */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the bowler */,
  "bowling_average" REAL /* Bowling average of the bowler in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the bowler in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_bowling_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_bowling_stats_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_champion" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_matches" (
  "season_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_num" INTEGER /* Match number within the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "user_activation_status" TEXT /* Activation status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of weather conditions */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the match */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the match */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the match */,
  "rainfall" TEXT /* Rainfall during the match */,
  "weather_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_reports" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the pitch */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the pitch (1-10) */,
  "pitch_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the pitch conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowler_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injured bowler */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "injury_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowler_injuries_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowler_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of training session */,
  "training_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the training session */,
  "training_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the training session (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowler_training_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowler_performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance trend */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "start_period" TEXT /* Start period for the trend analysis */,
  "end_period" TEXT /* End period for the trend analysis */,
  "performance_change" TEXT /* Change in performance (e.g., improvement, decline) */,
  "trend_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance trend */,
  "trend_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the performance trend (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowler_performance_trends_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)
